010package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
011
012import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
013import edu.wpi.first.math.VecBuilder;
014import edu.wpi.first.math.Vector;
015import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
016import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
017import edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3;
018import edu.wpi.first.math.util.Units;
019import edu.wpi.first.networktables.BooleanSubscriber;
020import edu.wpi.first.networktables.DoubleSubscriber;
021import edu.wpi.first.units.*;
022import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.*;
023import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.LEDPattern;
024import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.simulation.SingleJointedArmSim;
025import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.util.Color;
026import com.ctre.phoenix6.CANBus;
027import dev.doglog.DogLog;
028
029import com.pathplanner.lib.path.PathConstraints;
030
031/*-
032 * File containing tunable settings for every subsystem on the robot.
033 *
034 * We use DogLog's tunables in order to have tunable
035 * values that we can edit on whatever dashboard we
036 * are using.
037 */
038public interface Settings {
039
040    Time DT = Seconds.of(0.020);
041
042    boolean DEBUG_MODE = true;
043
044    CANBus CANBUS = new CANBus("rio");
045
046    public interface EnabledSubsystems {
047
048        BooleanSubscriber FEEDER = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Feeder", false);
049
050        BooleanSubscriber INTAKE = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Intake", true);
051
052        BooleanSubscriber LED = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/LED", false);
053
054        BooleanSubscriber HANDOFF = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Handoff", false);
055
056        BooleanSubscriber SHOOTER = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Shooter", false);
057
058        BooleanSubscriber VISION = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Vision", false);
059
060        BooleanSubscriber SWERVE = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Swerve", false);
061    }
062
063    public interface Vision {
064
065        // TODO: These numbers are temporary, may need testing
066        public final Vector<N3> MT1_STDEVS = VecBuilder.fill(0.5, 0.5, 1.0);
067
068        public final Vector<N3> MT2_STDEVS = VecBuilder.fill(0.7, 0.7, 694694.0);
069
070        public final Pose2d INVALID_POSITION = Pose2d.kZero;
071
072        public final double MAX_ANGULAR_VELOCITY_RAD_SEC = 2 * Math.PI;
073    }
074
075    public interface Intake {
076
077        public interface Pivot {
078
079            // state angles
080            // TODO:Get new pivot angles
081            Angle INITIAL_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-102);
082
083            Angle STOW_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-102);
084
085            Angle DEPLOY_ANGLE = Degrees.of(0);
086
087            Angle AGITATE_UP_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-42);
088
089            Angle DIGEST_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-92);
090
091            // misc
092            Angle ANGLE_TOLERANCE = Degrees.of(0.5);
093
094            Angle PUSHDOWN_THRESHOLD = Degrees.of(-20);
095
096            DoubleSubscriber PUSHDOWN_CURRENT = DogLog.tunable("Intake/Pivot/Pushdown Current Tuning Amps", 30.0);
097
098            // amps
099            Current STALL_CURRENT = Amps.of(25);
100
101            // TODO: set this up?
102            Time STALL_DEBOUNCE_SEC = Seconds.of(0.0);
103
104            Voltage HOMING_DOWN_VOLTAGE = Volts.of(3);
105
106            // sysid
107            Velocity<VoltageUnit> RAMP_RATE = Volts.of(1).per(Second);
108
109            Voltage STEP_VOLTAGE = Volts.of(1);
110
111            // sim
112            Angle MIN_ANGLE = Degrees.of(0);
113
114            Angle MAX_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-102.0);
115
116            double GEAR_RATIO = 60.0;
117
118            Distance PIVOT_ARM_LENGTH = Meters.of(0.1439822);
119
120            // mass in kg
121            MomentOfInertia MOI = KilogramSquareMeters.of(SingleJointedArmSim.estimateMOI(PIVOT_ARM_LENGTH.in(Meters), 1));
122        }
123
124        public interface Roller {
125
126            Current STALL_CURRENT = Amps.of(50);
127
128            Time STALL_DEBOUNCE_SEC = Seconds.of(0.1);
129
130            double GEAR_RATIO = 16.0 / 27.0;
131
132            MomentOfInertia J = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.001);
133
134            double IDLE_DUTY_CYCLE = 0;
135
136            double INTAKE_DUTY_CYCLE = 1;
137
138            double OUTTAKE_DUTY_CYCLE = -1;
139        }
140    }
141
142    public interface Feeder {
143
144        double FEEDER_REVERSE_DUTY_CYCLE = -1;
145
146        double FEEDER_FORWARD_DUTY_CYCLE = 1;
147
148        // TODO: get from mec
149        double GEAR_RATIO = 1;
150
151        MomentOfInertia J = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.001);
152    }
153
154    public interface LED {
155
156        // TODO: Get actual length of led, along with length of individual sections
157        int LED_LENGTH = 80;
158
159        // Buffer Views {Starting Index, Ending Index}
160        int[] SHOOTER_BUFFER = { 0, 19 };
161
162        int[] FEEDER_BUFFER = { 20, 39 };
163
164        int[] INTAKE_BUFFER = { 40, 59 };
165
166        int[] HANDOFF_BUFFER = { 60, 79 };
167
168        // shooter
169        LEDPattern SHOOTING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kOrange);
170
171        LEDPattern FERRYING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kPurple);
172
173        LEDPattern MANUAL = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kPeru);
174
175        // feeder
176        LEDPattern FEEDER_FORWARD = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kBlue);
177
178        LEDPattern FEEDER_REVERSE = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kRed);
179
180        // intake
181        LEDPattern INTAKING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kYellow);
182
183        LEDPattern OUTTAKING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kGreen);
184
185        LEDPattern HOMING_DOWN = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kGainsboro);
186
187        LEDPattern AGITATING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kCyan);
188
189        // handoff
190        LEDPattern HANDOFF_FORWARD = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kDarkOrange);
191
192        // mmm papaya whip
193        LEDPattern HANDOFF_REVERSE = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kPapayaWhip);
194
195        // states
196        LEDPattern DISABLED = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kGray);
197    }
198
199    public interface Handoff {
200
201        double IDLE_DUTY_CYCLE = 0.0;
202
203        double FORWARD_DUTY_CYCLE = 1.0;
204
205        double REVERSE_DUTY_CYCLE = -1.0;
206
207        double STALL_CURRENT = 67;
208
209        // TODO: get and maybe convert to wpilib units
210        double STALL_DEBOUNCE = 67;
211
212        double J_KG_METERS_SQUARED = 1;
213
214        double SIM_GEAR_RATIO = 1;
215    }
216
217    public interface Shooter {
218
219        Time SHOOT_TIME_AUTO = Seconds.of(1.5);
220
221        Velocity<VoltageUnit> RAMP_RATE = Volts.of(1).per(Second);
222
223        Voltage STEP_VOLTAGE = Volts.of(7);
224
225        Distance WHEEL_RADIUS = Inches.of(4);
226
227        // Sim
228        MomentOfInertia J = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.1);
229
230        double GEAR_RATIO = 0.1;
231
232        // TODO: get
233        Distance FLYWHEEL_RADIUS = Inches.of(3);
234
235        // TODO: Test for manual shooting RPM
236        AngularVelocity MANUAL_HUB_RPM = RPM.of(3000);
237
238        public interface RPMInterpolation {
239
240            double[][] distanceRPMInterpolationValues = { { 1.0, 1000.0 }, { 2.0, 1500.0 }, { 3.0, 2000.0 }, { 4.0, 2500.0 }, { 5.0, 3000.0 } };
241        }
242
243        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
244        public interface TOFInterpolation {
245
246            double[][] distanceTOFInterpolationValues = { { 1.0, 0.5 }, { 2.0, 0.75 }, { 3.0, 1.0 }, { 4.0, 1.25 }, { 5.0, 1.5 } };
247        }
248
249        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
250        public interface FerryRPMInterpolation {
251
252            double[][] ferryDistanceRPMInterpolation = { { 1.0, 1000.0 }, { 2.0, 1500.0 }, { 3.0, 2000.0 }, { 4.0, 2500.0 }, { 5.0, 3000.0 } };
253        }
254
255        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
256        public interface FerryTOFInterpolation {
257
258            double[][] FerryTOFInterpolationInterpolation = { { 1.0, 0.5 }, { 2.0, 0.75 }, { 3.0, 1.0 }, { 4.0, 1.25 }, { 5.0, 1.5 } };
259        }
260        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
261    }
262
263    public interface Swerve {
264
265        double MODULE_VELOCITY_DEADBAND_M_PER_S = 0.1;
266
267        double ROTATIONAL_DEADBAND_RAD_PER_S = 0.1;
268
269        public interface Constraints {
270
271            double MAX_VELOCITY_M_PER_S = 4.3;
272
273            // TODO: revert to 15.0
274            double MAX_ACCEL_M_PER_S_SQUARED = 2.0;
275
276            double MAX_ANGULAR_VEL_RAD_PER_S = Units.degreesToRadians(400.0);
277
278            // TODO: revert to 900
279            double MAX_ANGULAR_ACCEL_RAD_PER_S = Units.degreesToRadians(300.0);
280
281            PathConstraints DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS = new PathConstraints(MAX_VELOCITY_M_PER_S, MAX_ACCEL_M_PER_S_SQUARED, MAX_ANGULAR_VEL_RAD_PER_S, MAX_ANGULAR_ACCEL_RAD_PER_S);
282        }
283
284        public interface Alignment {
285
286            public interface Constraints {
287
288                double DEFAULT_MAX_VELOCITY = 4.3;
289
290                double DEFAULT_MAX_ACCELERATION = 15.0;
291
292                double DEFAULT_MAX_ANGULAR_VELOCITY = Units.degreesToRadians(400.0);
293
294                double DEFAULT_MAX_ANGULAR_ACCELERATION = Units.degreesToRadians(900.0);
295            }
296
297            public interface Tolerances {
298
299                Distance X_TOLERANCE = Inches.of(2.0);
300
301                Distance Y_TOLERANCE = Inches.of(2.0);
302
303                Rotation2d THETA_TOLERANCE = Rotation2d.fromDegrees(1);
304
305                Pose2d POSE_TOLERANCE = new Pose2d(X_TOLERANCE.in(Meters), Y_TOLERANCE.in(Meters), THETA_TOLERANCE);
306
307                LinearVelocity MAX_VELOCITY_WHEN_ALIGNED = MetersPerSecond.of(0.15);
308
309                Time ALIGNMENT_DEBOUNCE = Seconds.of(0.15);
310            }
311
312            public interface Targets {
313
314                // TODO: Get actual angle
315                Rotation2d HUB_LEFT_CORNER = Rotation2d.fromDegrees(45);
316
317                Rotation2d HUB_RIGHT_CORNER = Rotation2d.fromDegrees(-45);
318            }
319        }
320    }
321
322    public interface Driver {
323
324        double BUZZ_TIME = 1.0;
325
326        double BUZZ_INTENSITY = 1.0;
327
328        public interface Drive {
329
330            double DEADBAND = 0.05;
331
332            double RC = 0.05;
333
334            double POWER = 2.0;
335        }
336
337        public interface Turn {
338
339            double DEADBAND = 0.05;
340
341            double RC = 0.05;
342
343            double POWER = 2.0;
344        }
345    }
346}
